overview.description: The ProShares Ultra PLTR (PLTA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x exposure to the daily returns of Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) stock, less expenses. PLTA was launched on Sep 8, 2025 and is issued by ProShares.
